title: Brachistus ciliatus
taxonomy: Brachistus ciliatus is classified as a species within the family Acanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flowers. This family is further divided into various subfamilies and tribes. The genus Brachistus is a part of the subfamily Acanthoideae. Within the Acanthaceae family, Brachistus ciliatus is a unique species characterized by its distinct ciliations or hair-like structures. Its classification provides valuable information on its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
